r2v-kamui-bytedance-seedance-v20-referen.description: ByteDance Seedance 2.0 Reference-to-Video - Fal model bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-video. prompt (required); image_urls (up to 9), video_urls (up to 3), audio_urls (up to 3, requires image or video); resolution 480p/720p; duration auto or 4-15; aspect_ratio; generate_audio; seed; end_user_id.
